response: The production web server prod-web-01, located in the us-east-1 region, has been running steadily for 45 days with 127 active connections. It is currently utilizing 78% of its CPU, 12.4 GB out of 16 GB of memory, and 234 GB out of 500 GB of disk space. Performance metrics show a P99 latency of 145ms and only 3 errors per hour, indicating reliable operation overall.
